bead.title: Stage 4.2: Beads list view + cursor pagination (project-scoped)
bead.description: New files: src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/beads/+page.svelte, +page.ts, beads.gql. Table of beads with 'Load more' button that cursors through pages. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #36.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: create 15 test beads via `ddx bead create`, load the page, see 10 beads in the table. (2) Click 'Load more', see 5 more beads appended, no duplicates. (3) Verify in completion note with the bead IDs shown.
